title: Cottagemon Addon [Cobblemon]
description: The Official Cottagemon Addon, for a cozy and cottagecore experience
body:
### The Fakemon of the Cotere Region are finally waddling into your Cobblemon worlds!
### 
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This addon adds some of the Cotere Variants for players to **Cottagecore-ify their Minecraft Cobblemon worlds**. The first release of this addon adds 11 cotere forms, consisting entirely of regional variants, convergent forms, and biased forms!

A lot of variants are still in the works, so check out our _discord server_ to get notified of any updates for the Cottagemon Addon! If you'd like to learn more about them, I suggest you to also check out the _dedicated Fakemon thread in the Cobblemon Discord Server_.

We hope you have a relaxing and cozy time playing with our pokemon!

#

<details>
<summary>Currently Available Pokémon</summary>

In the game currently, we have:
- the Coterian Scorbunny line
- the Coterian Butterfree line
- the Coterian Numel line
- the Coterian Sinistea line
- the Inklett line
- the Woofloo line
- the Tadborb line
- the Hoppsey line
- the Coterian Mareep line
- the Coterian Pikachu line
- Coterian Falinks
</details>

#

```
please note that this addon is NOT to be used on any public servers without first asking permission from the Cotere Crew.
```
